dbExport.title: Export your data
dbExport.desc: Backup your current data to a file you can store somewhere else

reportExport.title: Generate a report
reportExport.desc: Save a human-readable report about your data to share with therapists and loved ones

dbImportDesc: Warning! It will override any existing data

dbImportOld.title: Import your data from an old version of Ampersand
dbImportOld.desc: For backup files made with Ampersand < 0.2.0
dbImportOld.note: Old versions of Ampersand used a file format (ampdb) that is now outdated. If you're keeping old backups, make sure to import them now and re-export them, as this option will be removed in a few versions' time.

jsonExport.title: Export your data to a JSON file
jsonExport.desc: Backup your data to a format that can be imported into other applications and tools

pkImport: Import your data from a PluralKit export
ocImport: Import your data from an Octocon export
tuImport: Import your data from a Tupperbox export
spImport: Import your data from a Simply Plural export

status.imported: The backup has been imported. Please restart the app.
status.importedSp: The Simply Plural export has been imported. Please restart the app.
status.importedOc: The Octocon export has been imported. Please restart the app.
status.importedPk: The PluralKit export has been imported. Please restart the app.
status.importedTu: The Tupperbox export has been imported. Please restart the app.
status.exportedApp: The backup has been exported to the location you chose.
status.exportedAppIos: The backup has been exported to the Ampersand folder on the Files app.
status.exportedReport: The report has been saved in the location you chose.
status.exportedReportIos: The report has been saved in the Ampersand folder on the Files app.
status.exportedJson: The JSON export has been saved in the location you chose.
status.exportedJsonIos: The JSON export has been saved in the Ampersand folder on the Files app.
status.errorOc: Error while importing the Octocon export.
status.errorSp: Error while importing the Simply Plural export.
status.errorPk: Error while importing the PluralKit export.
status.errorTu: Error while importing the Tupperbox export.
